evals.expected_output: A complete research report for Datadog covering all 5 signal dimensions. Datadog is a large public SaaS company with a free trial, self-serve signup, active LinkedIn ads, and likely SDR hiring — should be QUALIFIED with multiple signals matching. The report should follow the exact template format and save research notes to Apollo.
expectations: The output includes a qualification verdict (QUALIFIED or NOT QUALIFIED)
The output contains a 5-row signal table with Match/No Match/Inconclusive for each signal
The output includes a Website Intelligence section with self-serve signup, pricing, free trial, product launches, and CTAs
The output includes an SDR/BDR job listing section
The output includes a LinkedIn Ads section with ad count and themes
The output includes a Recent Funding section
The output includes a Product Launch section
The skill called view_account to fetch account data
The skill called organization_job_postings using the organization_id (not account ID)
The skill called update_account to save research notes
The skill called update_account to add the account to a list

evals.prompt: hey can you qualify this account for me? the domain is freshworks.com, i want to see if they're worth pursuing
evals.expected_output: The skill should resolve freshworks.com to an Apollo account by searching, then produce a full research report. Freshworks is a public SaaS company with free trials and self-serve — should be QUALIFIED. The casual tone of the prompt should not affect the structured output.
expectations: The skill searched Apollo using the domain to find the account
The output follows the research report template format
The output includes all 5 signal sections
The qualification verdict is present and clearly stated
Research notes were saved to the Apollo custom field
The account was added to the appropriate Apollo list

evals.expected_output: A complete research report for McKinsey. As a consulting firm (not a SaaS company), McKinsey likely has no self-serve signup, no free trial, and no product launches. They probably have LinkedIn ads but for thought leadership/recruiting, not lead generation. Should likely be NOT QUALIFIED or have very few matching signals. The report should still cover all 5 dimensions thoroughly.
expectations: The output includes all 5 signal sections even though most are negative
Missing/negative signals use the correct fallback phrases from the template
The qualification verdict reflects the actual signal analysis
The summary table shows the correct count of matching signals
Research notes were saved even though the account may be disqualified
